subject: Chore: bump actions/checkout from 5.0.0 to 6.0.0
commit_message:
Chore: bump actions/checkout from 5.0.0 to 6.0.0

Bumps actions/checkout from 5.0.0 to 6.0.0.
## Release notes

Sourced from actions/checkout's releases.

v6.0.0
What's Changed

Update README to include Node.js 24 support details and requirements by @​salmanmkc in actions/checkout#2248
Persist creds to a separate file by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2286
v6-beta by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2298
update readme/changelog for v6 by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2311

Full Changelog: https://github.com/actions/checkout/compare/v5.0.0...v6.0.0
v6-beta
What's Changed
Updated persist-credentials to store the credentials under $RUNNER_TEMP instead of directly in the local git config.
This requires a minimum Actions Runner version of v2.329.0 to access the persisted credentials for Docker container action scenarios.
v5.0.1
What's Changed

Port v6 cleanup to v5 by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2301

Full Changelog: https://github.com/actions/checkout/compare/v5...v5.0.1

## Changelog

Sourced from actions/checkout's changelog.

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/portal-ng-bff-docker-verify-master/246/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/portal-ng-bff-docker-verify-master/246

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/portal-ng-bff-gradle-build-master/603/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/portal-ng-bff-gradle-build-master/603

Abandoned

Abandoning: master branch already has this dependency at the target version (or newer). This change is redundant.

Context: A historical bug in lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action caused incorrect change correlation when dependabot updated existing PRs in place, leaving orphaned Gerrit changes. This cleanup resynchronises Gerrit with GitHub state. Dependabot will re-raise an equivalent change if a newer version becomes available.
